product_results.title: JETech Privacy Screen Protector for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch, Anti-Spy Tempered Glass Film with Easy Installation Tool, 2-Pack

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be a really good product that provides great privacy. The protector is easily installed and works well, with users noting that the screen works great after installation. However, some customers report durability issues, with the protector cracking easily and breaking after just a few days of use. Customers have mixed opinions regarding alignment and screen visibility.

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality & Real Privacy
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been using the JETech Privacy Screen Protector for my iPhone 17 Pro, and I honestly really like it. The installation was straightforward, with no bubbles or alignment issues. The screen feels smooth to the touch, and it doesn’t affect the clarity or responsiveness at all.The privacy feature works exactly as advertised — when viewed straight on, everything looks crisp and bright, but anyone trying to peek from the side just sees a dark screen. It gives me a lot more peace of mind when I’m out in public or using my phone around other people.It also does a great job resisting fingerprints and scratches. After several days of use, it still looks brand new.If you want a reliable privacy protector that doesn’t interfere with your display quality, the JETech one is definitely worth it. I’d recommend it to anyone with an iPhone 17 Pro.
authors_reviews.author: GC

authors_reviews.title: Parfait !
authors_reviews.text: Ça s’installe facilement. C’est très agréable savoir que l’information qu’on consulte reste privée.
authors_reviews.author: Tania Garcia

authors_reviews.title: Best Screen Protector
authors_reviews.text: Excellent screen protector! It comes with all the necessary accessories, including an installation frame that makes applying it to the screen very easy. The protector feels very smooth and high quality. I always buy my screen protectors from this brand and have never been disappointed. I would definitely recommend it to everyone.😊
authors_reviews.author: N Kaur

authors_reviews.text: VERY easy to apply perfectly and straights Does act as a privacy screen. Has already cracked 16 days into using. I DO have an otterbox on my phone as well, but the corner of the screen protector still cracked

authors_reviews.author: Bianca Ysabel Siacor

authors_reviews.title: Quick and straightforward installation; Tint display may not be well received by everyone.
authors_reviews.text: This order was a 2-pack set of privacy screen protectors. Besides the 2 privacy screen protectors, it came with an instruction manual (video instructions also provided online), an installation tool, a squeegee, 2 sets of cleaning cloths, alcohol wipes, and dust stickers.The installation instructions were clear and easy to follow. Installation was straightforward as well, especially with the alignment (aided by the installation tool). I did end up with a few air bubbles at the end, but was able to push most of them up using the squeegee as instructed. A couple of days of usage later, the bubbles were virtually non-existent.The privacy screen protector is a full-screen tempered glass tinted all the way except for the selfie camera hole, which is completely clear. It does provide privacy when the phone is being viewed from angles other than directly above. It's not perfect, but it'll make it harder for peepers.Though it does provide decent privacy, it does change the viewing experience for the user as well, as the tinted glass makes everything darker. It seems actually a bit like a dark-yellow, almost as if "Night-Shift" mode is always turned on. It took me at least a couple of days to get somewhat used to it. It's not like you're looking at your phone through sunglasses, but it'll definitely take some time to adjust.As for touch sensitivity, it feels and works great, just like the original iPhone 17 screen itself.Overall, easy to install; functionally, it will take some time for your eyes to adjust, but touch-wise, it works fine. Fit-wise, it's perfect with the phone case that I'm using. You also have peace of mind as the manufacturer offers a 12-month to lifetime warranty (if you register the product).
authors_reviews.author: Kai
